markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CheckVat Access:** Paola can resolve the account setup issue by completing the initial onboarding workflow; no payment is required.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [**AEO Strategy:** The "Babel Alternatives" article was cited 17x in its first week, proving the strategy of targeting competitor keywords is highly effective for rapid LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**New Content:** Five articles are in progress, including "English for Engineers," which will be supported by a dedicated landing page to capture high-intent users.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
  - [**Video Repurposing:** Repurposing blog content for YouTube is a viable strategy, but only for keywords that already show video results in Google to maximize impact.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)

## Topics

### CheckVat Access & Onboarding

  - [**Problem:** Paola is prompted to choose a plan during CheckVat setup, blocking access to the Talaera workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [**Solution:** Complete the initial onboarding workflow to create a personal workspace. This step is required before the shared Talaera workspace becomes visible.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [**Data Retention:** The Talaera workspace retains data for 60 days, not the 14 days Paola observed.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

### AEO Strategy & Performance

  - [**Methodology:** GrowthX uses CheckVat to track Talaera's visibility in LLM responses.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
      - [**Rationale:** 20–30% of enterprise research now starts on LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
      - [**Execution:** GrowthX tests prompts based on likely user queries (e.g., "alternatives to Preply") to measure performance.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [**Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [The "Babel Alternatives" article was cited 17x in its first week.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Insight:** LLMs scrape Google for content immediately after indexing, prioritizing clear information over traditional SEO rank.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [**Long-Term Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Competitors will eventually create similar content.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
      - [**Solution:** Build long-term authority through a deep content library and a strong URL structure (e.g., `/blog/business-english-platforms/`). This authority is a durable competitive advantage.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)

### New Content & Landing Page Strategy

  - [**In Progress:** Five articles are being written this week:](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Cambly Alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Rosetta Stone Alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Business English for Engineers](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Two other educational pieces](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**"English for Engineers" Landing Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
      - [**Proposal:** Create a dedicated landing page to support the blog post.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The page and post serve different user intents (high-intent vs. educational) and can both rank on page one, increasing visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will provide the "Atlas" research report to inform the landing page's content.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)

### Video Content Strategy

  - [**Observation:** YouTube is a consistent source for LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [**Proposal:** Repurpose blog content into YouTube videos.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [**Recommendation:** Prioritize keywords that already show video results in Google to maximize impact.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [**Feasibility:** This is a separate project requiring a new production pipeline and on-camera talent.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Paola:**](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
      - [Complete the CheckVat onboarding workflow to access the Talaera workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
      - [Provide the "Atlas" research report for the "English for Engineers" landing page.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
      - [Investigate why Paola only sees 10 prompts in CheckVat.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
      - [Add new prompts to CheckVat to expand tracking coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/AL6pqt9NLwbiaU4WVio5Tp86Rst2sohq?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
